sources_consulted: Third FYR (2025) — protectiveness statement + monitoring tables
Second FYR (2020) — protectiveness statement + monitoring tables

master_chronology.event: Victor Chemical Company begins operating elemental phosphorus production facility from phosphate ore
Facility operated by Victor Chemical Company, later Stauffer Chemical Company. Facility and wastewater ponds on South parcel; slag processing on North parcel.
Stauffer Chemical Company ceases operations
Stauffer Chemical Company decommissions and dismantles facilities
Initial Assessment Completed
Site proposed to the National Priorities List
Remedial Investigation started; Combined RI/FS begins; First Administrative Order of Consent issued
Site finalized on the National Priorities List (Final NPL)
Second Administrative Order of Consent
Removal action begins (EPA Oversight) — on-site phosphorus water removal
Stauffer Chemical Company forms Stauffer Management Company — current site owner and PRP
Record of Decision signed for OU-1; Final Remedy Selected; RI/FS completed
Removal action completed
First Explanation of Significant Differences (ESD) issued
Remedial Design begins (EPA Oversight)
Second ESD issued
Consent Decree (SITEWIDE)
Third ESD issued
Third Administrative Order of Consent
Consent Decree (OU-01)
Fourth ESD issued
Remedial Design completed; Remedial Action begins (EPA Oversight)
Major construction: excavation/consolidation of 220K+ cu yds; 2 caps (42 acres); groundwater cutoff wall (2,600+ ft); Meyers Cove restoration; sea wall (1,300+ ft); fencing
Remedial Action completed; Soil cleanup complete; Operations & Maintenance phase begins
First Five-Year Review published — OU-1 determined PROTECTIVE
Second Five-Year Review published — OU-1 determined PROTECTIVE
Third Five-Year Review published — OU-1 determined SHORT-TERM PROTECTIVE. Follow-up required: expanded surface water sampling due to gross alpha increases at SW-1 and MW-12-2
OU-02 GROUNDWATER REMEDIATION: Combined RI/FS estimated to begin

surface_water_monitoring.pending_expansion: 2025 FYR requires additional surface water sampling locations in Meyers Cove and Anclote River

OU-00.name: SITEWIDE
OU-00.description: Administrative/enforcement umbrella; includes FYRs and consent decrees

OU-01.name: OPERABLE UNIT 1
OU-01.description: Soil and source material remediation; includes consolidation, capping, groundwater cutoff wall

OU-02.name: GROUNDWATER REMEDIATION
OU-02.significance: Separate groundwater OU explains Construction Complete = No

cross_reference_checks.finding: PARTIALLY INCONSISTENT — Cleanup Activities page says '2010-2011' for major physical construction, but Cleanup Progress schedule shows Remedial Action started 2008-09-30. The 2010-2011 range likely refers to the peak construction period when the majority of physical work was executed (caps, cutoff wall, sea wall), not the full RA window.
CONSISTENT — 2020-06-30. However, site profile announcement is stale: only references second FYR, not the 2025 third FYR.
INCONSISTENT — Cleanup Activities page implies single OU soil remedy. Cleanup Progress schedule reveals separate OU-02 for groundwater remediation not yet initiated.

chronology_gaps_identified.description: Between facility dismantling (1983) and Initial Assessment (1987-06-30). Discovery and reporting process not documented in available records.
Between Initial Assessment (1987-06-30) and NPL proposal (1992-02-07) / RI start (1992-07-28). Pre-NPL assessment activities not detailed.
Gap in enforcement/remedy modification activity between third ESD (2000) and Consent Decree (2005). Remedial Design was ongoing during this period (1999-2008).
Between RA completion (2011-09-16) and first FYR (2015). O&M ongoing but no regulatory milestones documented. Monitoring data exists for this period per FYR tables.

contradictions_flagged.description: EPA site profile announcement references only second FYR (June 2020). Third FYR (July 2025) has been published but profile announcement not updated.

Cleanup Activities page 'What Has Been Done' section dates major construction to 2010-2011. Cleanup Progress schedule shows Remedial Action start at 2008-09-30. The 2010-2011 reference likely describes peak construction, not full RA window.
Cleanup Activities page implies single-OU remedy (soil only). Cleanup Progress schedule and FYR documents confirm two-OU structure with OU-02 (Groundwater Remediation) pending.

administrative_notes.note: EPA site profile main page contains typo: 'Five-Year Reveiw' (should be 'Review')
administrative_notes.source: Site profile home page announcement box

administrative_notes.note: Street address listed as '877 ANCLOTE BOULEVARD' on profile page but '877 Anclote Road' in Cleanup Activities background text. Likely the same road (Anclote Boulevard = Anclote Road).
